tasks.label: Start Test Launcher without Firebase Emulator
tasks.detail: Start the local launcher without Firebase Emulator. This can connect to production Firebase.
args: Remove-Item Env:NODE_OPTIONS -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:VSCODE_INSPECTOR_OPTIONS -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & node .\launcher\launcher-server.cjs 8081
